def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by (code, date) for per-code rolling operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # 1. Rolling std of high over 10 periods (per code)
    high_std = rolling_std(pl.col('high'), window=10)

    # 2. Cross-sectional rank of the rolling std (per date)
    rank_std = rank(high_std).over('date')

    # 3. Negate the rank
    neg_rank = -1 * rank_std

    # 4. Rolling correlation between high and volume over 10 periods (per code)
    high_vol_corr = rolling_corr(pl.col('high'), pl.col('volume'), window=10)

    # 5. Multiply the two components
    factor = neg_rank * high_vol_corr

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
